prompt: Add scaffolding to /Users/josh_folder/Open-ClaudeCode using the progressive-scaffolding skill. Focus on controllability and observability. Show the assessment report and generate scaffolding.

assertions.name: uses-new-dimensions
assertions.check: Output uses C1-C4/O1-O4/V1-V3 dimensions, not E1-E4

assertions.name: code-injection-not-files
assertions.check: Output proposes code injections with [HARNESS-INJECT-START] markers, not just .harness/ wrapper scripts

assertions.name: injection-point-analysis
assertions.check: Output identifies specific files and line ranges for injection points

assertions.name: shows-approval-flow
assertions.check: Output shows patches before applying (PROPOSE + APPROVE phases)

assertions.name: tier-recommendation
assertions.check: Output recommends a specific starting tier (0-5)
